allow: Bash(git tag -a v1.0.0-pre-recursion -m "Release before recursive org summary implementation")
Bash(git add csharp/Models/ csharp/Services/ csharp/Program.cs docs/recursive-org-summary-*.md)

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add async job infrastructure for recursive org queries (Phases 1-3)

Implement foundation for asynchronous query execution to support large-scale
recursive organizational hierarchy traversal (up to 40K users).

Schema extensions:
- Add MaxDepth and MaxNodes to DirectoryPlanStep for recursion control
- Add Aggregation support to ProjectionDefinition
- Create AggregationDefinition class (group_by, count, level metadata)

Job infrastructure:
- QueryJob model with status tracking and progress metadata
- IQueryJobStore + InMemoryQueryJobStore (thread-safe job state)
- IQueryJobQueue + InMemoryQueryJobQueue (Channel-based FIFO)
- IQueryJobManager + QueryJobManager (lifecycle management)
- QueryJobExecutorHostedService (background processor, 3 concurrent limit)

Executor updates:
- Add IProgress<PlanProgressUpdate> overload to IDirectoryPlanExecutor
- Maintain backward compatibility with parameterless overload
- DirectoryPlanRuntime accepts optional progress reporter

Documentation:
- docs/recursive-org-summary-workflow.md (complete implementation guide)
- docs/recursive-org-summary-architecture.md (component design reference)

Next: Implement expand_reports operation with breadth-first traversal

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Implement expand_reports operation with breadth-first traversal (Phase 4)

Add core recursive organizational hierarchy traversal with LDAP batching
and aggregation support.

Executor enhancements:
- ExecuteExpandReportsStep: Breadth-first traversal with visited tracking
- Progress reporting after each level (nodes, depth, estimated remaining)
- Depth limit (default 10, max 100) as cycle safety valve
- Node limit (default 10K, max 50K) prevents memory exhaustion
- Natural end detection when no more reports found
- Cycle detection via visited DN set

LDAP batching:
- GetDirectReportsBatch: Single OR-filter query per level
- Reduces O(n) queries to O(depth) queries
- Example: (|(manager=DN1)(manager=DN2)...) for entire level at once

Aggregation:
- ComputeAggregation: Group by specified fields with counts
- Integrated into projection pipeline
- RuntimeResult.Aggregation stores grouped_counts dictionary

Operations switch:
- Added "expand_reports" case to ExecuteStepAsync
- Falls through to ExecuteExpandReportsStep method

Builds successfully, ready for API endpoint updates.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add async API endpoints for job-based queries (Phase 5)

Implement fire-and-poll pattern for long-running queries.

New endpoints:
- POST /api/query/execute-async → 202 Accepted with jobId
- GET /api/query/jobs/{jobId} → status, progress, results
- POST /api/query/jobs/{jobId}/cancel → cancel running job
- GET /api/query/download-async/{jobId} → download completed results

Endpoint features:
- Job ownership verification (user isolation)
- Live progress updates (nodes, depth, percentage)
- Aggregation summary in completed job results
- Download format support (CSV, Excel, HTML, text)

Controller updates:
- Inject IQueryJobManager
- ExecuteQueryAsync creates job, returns immediately
- GetJobStatus polls job state with progress
- CancelJob requests cancellation
- DownloadAsync streams cached results

Response payloads match async workflow specification.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
